diagnostics.name: Gradient Noise Scale
diagnostics.summary: Estimate critical batch size and whether larger batches are likely to help.
questions: Is my batch size wasting compute?
Should I increase or decrease batch size?
diagnostics.call_timing: During training, preferably from gradient-accumulation micro-batches.
limitations: Estimates optimization efficiency, not final generalization.
Extra-pass mode adds forward/backward work.
diagnostics.citation: McCandlish et al. (2018), An Empirical Model of Large-Batch Training.

diagnostics.name: Gradient Health Monitor
diagnostics.summary: Detect non-finite, vanished, exploded, clipped, or disproportionate gradients.
questions: Why did my loss become NaN?
Are my gradients exploding or vanishing?
limitations: Thresholds are heuristics and depend on architecture and optimizer.
The update ratio is an SGD-style approximation.
diagnostics.citation: Operational diagnostic; reports established gradient and update statistics.

diagnostics.name: Batch Inspector
diagnostics.summary: Catch malformed tensors, non-finite values, extreme scales, and label problems.
questions: Is this training batch broken?
Why does training fail immediately?
diagnostics.call_timing: Before the forward pass, or periodically at data-loader boundaries.
limitations: A healthy batch does not prove the whole dataset is correct.
Class checks assume classification-style targets.

diagnostics.name: TrainGuard
diagnostics.summary: Estimate whether continuing training is likely to improve validation loss.
questions: Should I stop training?
Has validation loss plateaued?
limitations: Curve extrapolation can fail after regime changes.
Treat stop signals as advice, especially with sparse evaluations.
diagnostics.citation: Related to Domhan et al. (2015), learning-curve extrapolation.

diagnostics.name: Plasticity Probe
diagnostics.summary: Measure dormant units and feature effective rank during training.
questions: Is my network losing plasticity?
Are hidden features collapsing or becoming dormant?
diagnostics.call_timing: Attach before training and measure after representative batches.
limitations: Activation thresholds depend on architecture and normalization.
Low plasticity is a diagnostic signal, not a guaranteed intervention target.
diagnostics.citation: Dohare et al. (2024) and Lyle et al. (2023).

diagnostics.name: Example Dynamics Tracker
diagnostics.summary: Track forgetting, confidence, variability, and ambiguous examples.
questions: Which examples are repeatedly forgotten?
Which data points are hard or ambiguous?
diagnostics.call_timing: Update after each example's forward pass.
limitations: Requires stable IDs across epochs.
Hard examples are not necessarily mislabeled.
diagnostics.citation: Toneva et al. (2019); Swayamdipta et al. (2020).

diagnostics.name: AUM Tracker
diagnostics.summary: Rank potentially mislabeled or ambiguous examples by margin dynamics.
questions: Which labels should I audit first?
Which examples have persistently poor margins?
limitations: Low AUM is a review priority, not proof of label error.
Threshold calibration is dataset-dependent.
diagnostics.citation: Pleiss et al. (2020), Identifying Mislabeled Data using AUM.

diagnostics.name: EL2N Tracker
diagnostics.summary: Estimate early example difficulty and data-pruning priority.
questions: Which examples matter most early in training?
Which examples might be safe pruning candidates?
limitations: Low-scoring examples are candidates, not automatically safe deletions.
Scores change with model and training stage.
diagnostics.citation: Paul et al. (2021), Deep Learning on a Data Diet.

diagnostics.name: Gradient Confusion Monitor
diagnostics.summary: Measure whether micro-batch gradients align or conflict.
questions: Are examples or micro-batches fighting each other?
Why is SGD progress noisy or slow?
limitations: Requires extra gradient computations.
Conflict is descriptive and may be expected in diverse data.

diagnostics.name: Neural Collapse Monitor
questions: Has late-stage classifier geometry entered neural collapse?
Are class features and classifier weights aligning?
diagnostics.call_timing: At checkpoints, usually in later-stage classification training.
limitations: Neural collapse is not a universal quality or generalization score.
Requires a classification representation and enough samples per class.
